name: Diamond Tennis Bracelet — Lab-Grown
story: Every diamond in this bracelet was individually selected for its fire and brilliance. Our master jewelers hand-set each stone using a four-prong technique that maximizes light return while keeping the profile elegant and wearable. This is a piece made for the moments that matter — anniversaries, milestones, the days you want to remember forever.
care_instructions: Clean gently with warm soapy water and a soft brush. Store in the provided jewelry box when not worn. Avoid contact with harsh chemicals. Bring it to us anytime for complimentary professional cleaning and inspection — that's our Free Lifetime Care promise.
